chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single product line on a sales order that links one product to a specific order and records its quantity and pricing.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Product | Key Attributes:
- Quantity of units ordered | Key Attributes:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | Product Relationships:
- A Product appears on zero or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment is a financial transaction record that settles a Sales Order, identified by a Payment ID, linked to exactly one Sales Order, and capturing the payment method used; an order may have one or more payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) | **Key Attributes**:
- Payment amount | **Key Attributes**:
- Confirmation timestamp | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | **Business Rules**:
- Payment must be confirmed before order ships | **Business Rules**:
- Refunds create new payment records with negative amounts | **Business Rules**:
- Multiple payment attempts can exist for one order | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Products
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single catalog item that belongs to exactly one category and has a unique SKU.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: The physical delivery of Products from a Warehouse to a Customer's delivery address. | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Key Attributes:
- Belongs to exactly one Category | Key Attributes:
- Unique SKU code | Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | Product Relationships:
- A Product belongs to exactly one Category | Product Relationships:
- A Product appears on zero or more Order Line Items | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | Product          → TB_PRODUCT

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is the business entity representing the physical delivery of products from a warehouse to a customer, associated with a sales order and tracked by a tracking number, identified by a unique shipment ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Tracking number | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment | **Business Rules**:
- One order may have multiple partial shipments | **Business Rules**:
- Delivery address must belong to the order's customer | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | | SHIPPED_AT | DATETIME | Ship timestamp | YES | | | TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: Sales Order is the business record that documents a customer's purchase of products, referencing exactly one customer and containing one or more order line items.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Customer | Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Customer Relationships:
- A Customer places zero or more Sales Orders

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master(Cust Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Customer Master entity representing unique customers, identified by CUST_ID, serving as the canonical reference key for customer-related data (e.g., in sales orders).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Customer Address is the delivery (or billing) address linked to a customer account and used as the shipment destination.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Definition: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | Business Context: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | Key Attributes:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Customer | Customer Relationships:
- A Customer places zero or more Sales Orders | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price At
entities_post_resolution.definition: Historical per-unit price at the moment an order was placed; the price recorded for the unit at order time (not the current price).
synonyms: unit price at time of order
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Business Rules**:
- Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | Key Attributes:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy is the business rule that products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition: Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, regional assignment, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products including identifiers, naming, category relationship, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical categories for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores metadata about customer orders including identifiers, order timing, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery, and record creation times.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual line items for customer orders, detailing which products were ordered, in what quantity, and the associated pricing and total line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores payment transactions linked to customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of individual shipments, linking each shipment to its order, tracking the shipment date, warehouse, tracking number, and current status.
